name: updateExistingTicket
description: Add a comment or update information on an existing ticket. Call this after the user selects a ticket from viewMyTickets() and provides update text. Requires the ticket ID and the comment or update text.

ticket_id.description: The ticket ID to update, e.g. HRC62425024

update_text.description: The comment or update text provided by the user to add to the ticket.
